title: best herbal teas for high blood pressure
description: Lithospermum erythrorhizon tea contains bioactive constituents such as flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which have been found to help in reducing high blood pressure by exerting a vasodilatory effect and improving cardiovascular health. This herbal tea has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that contribute to its blood pressure-lowering effects, making it a potential natural remedy for managing hypertension.
